name: Agree Realty Corporation Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a 4.250% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Agree Realty Corporation is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that primarily acquires and develops properties net leased to industry-leading retail tenants. The company focuses on acquiring and developing properties leased to tenants operating in necessity-based and omni-channel retail sectors. The Depositary Shares represent ownership of preferred stock in Agree Realty Corporation.
